name: Chinese Chicken Corn Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Parsley, finely minced and fresh
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chicken broth, creamed corn, and diced chicken in a large saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
3. Blend cornstarch with cold water and stir into the soup.
4. Continue cooking, uncovered, for 3 minutes.
5. Beat egg whites until foamy and stir them into the soup.
6. Reduce heat to a simmer and cook until foamy.
7. Ladle the soup into individual bowls and garnish with parsley.
8. Serve hot.
Food Exchanges per serving: 2 MEAT EXCHANGES + 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGES. CHO: 14g; PRO: 16g; FAT: 4g; CAL: 156. For low-sodium diets, substitute unsalted broth.
